overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a cozy, rustic attic bedroom with wooden beams and slanted ceilings. The character examines various objects including scrolls, a wardrobe, and furniture before exiting through a small doorway into a lower room. The scene features warm lantern lighting and detailed traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden attic bedroom with slanted ceiling and exposed beams

agents.ego_description: walking forward from the stairwell into the main attic space, observing the bed and furniture

entered.detail: large wooden bed with green blanket and white pillows positioned against the far wall
heavy red curtains framing the window behind the bed
tall wooden wardrobe with mirrored doors
warm glowing lantern suspended from the slanted ceiling
large decorative rug with blue and yellow patterns covering the wooden floor
long wooden dresser with multiple drawers against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy wooden attic bedroom from a stairwell, walking forward across a patterned rug toward a large bed with red curtains. The space features slanted wooden ceilings, exposed beams, and warm lantern lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom right side with wall-mounted shelves and scrolls

events.description: character turns right and approaches the wall with shelves and scrolls

agents.ego_description: turning to face the right wall, standing still to examine the scrolls and pottery on the shelves

entered.detail: wall-mounted wooden shelves holding pottery and small objects
wooden stand holding an unfurled parchment scroll
tall cylindrical yellow drum or container next to the shelves
small round wooden stool in front of the shelves

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to examine a wall with wooden shelves holding various objects, a scroll stand, and a yellow drum. The bed and curtains move out of view as the character focuses on this corner of the attic.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom center area with large wooden wardrobe and mirror

events.description: character turns back and walks toward the wooden wardrobe with mirror

agents.ego_description: turning away from the wall and walking toward the wardrobe, stopping to look at the mirror

entered.detail: large wooden armoire with mirrored doors reflecting the room
ornate brass coat stand with curved hooks

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks toward a large wooden wardrobe with mirrored doors, passing by a brass coat stand. The scroll wall elements fall behind as the character approaches the center of the room near the bed.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from attic to lower room through small doorway

events.description: character turns and walks back toward the stairwell area
character crouches through a small doorway into a different room with a chest and pumpkins

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the stairs, crouching through a small doorway, and emerging into a lower room with different furnishings

entered.detail: low wooden doorway in the wall leading to another room
large wooden storage chest with metal bands in the center of the new room
pile of pumpkins or gourds in the corner of the room
vase with white flowers on a small wooden table
closed wooden door at the far end of the new room

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back toward the stairwell, crouching through a small doorway in the wall. The scene transitions to a different room featuring a large wooden chest, pumpkins in the corner, and a vase with flowers on a table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, lantern-lit attic bedroom that eventually leads down into a rustic lower room. It begins as the character enters from a stairwell, walking across a patterned rug toward a large bed framed by red curtains under slanted wooden beams. As the character turns right, the bed recedes from view to reveal a corner filled with wooden shelves, a scroll stand, and a yellow drum. The camera then pivots and glides toward a large mirrored wardrobe and a brass coat stand before turning back toward the entrance. Finally, the character crouches through a small doorway, transitioning from the attic into a different room containing a large wooden chest, pumpkins, and a vase of flowers.
